story_so_far:
once upon a time... in a faraway land... there was a beautiful princess named Sophia... she had long, soft hair... and sparkling blue eyes

Princess Sophia lived in a cozy little castle... surrounded by a quiet forest... with tall trees that swayed gently in the breeze... and a soft, glowing moonlight that shone down on her every night

Princess Sophia loved to take long, quiet walks... in the forest at night... under the soft, glowing moonlight... with her best friend, a gentle little rabbit named Fluffy... who had soft, twinkling eyes

one night, as they were walking... under the soft, glowing moonlight... they stumbled upon a hidden path... that they had never seen before... it was winding and narrow, and it seemed to be calling to them

they decided to follow the path... and see where it would lead them... it wound through the trees, and over a little bridge... that crossed a softly flowing stream, under the soft, glowing moonlight
current_narration: they decided to follow the path... and see where it would lead them... it wound through the trees, and over a little bridge... that crossed a softly flowing stream, under the soft, glowing moonlight
